title: Speed sprint: ultra-common short words
description: Block 4 opener — drill the 10 most frequent English words at speed
text: the and you are for not but his she him her our you they the and you are for not but his she him her our you they the and you

tips.text: These 10 words make up ~25% of all English text
Don't think — let muscle memory drive

tips.target: the and you are for not but his she him her our you they the

tips.text: If you slow to look at keys, restart the lesson

tips.target: and you are for not but his she him her our you they the and you

character_tips.anna: Welcome to Block 4! Speed is muscle memory + confidence. Both grow here.
character_tips.maxim: Top words by frequency. Master these and you handle any English text faster.
character_tips.knopych: SPEED MODE! 🚀 Don't think — just FLY!
character_tips.klavochka: Light fingers, like butterflies! 🦋 Trust your hands.
